title: berkheya nivea
intro: Berkheya nivea, also known as White daisy bush, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its bright white and yellow daisy-like flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Berkheya nivea include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions, such as wounds, eczema, and acne. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical ointment, and is often used in traditional medicine in South Africa and other parts of the world.
